title: UNLOCKED causes mserver to work indefinitely
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE programs (id Int32, state String DEFAULT 'UNLOCKED', created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO programs (id, state) VALUES (2, NULL);
UPDATE programs SET state = 'UNLOCKED' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT * FROM programs WHERE state IS NOT NULL AND state = 'UNLOCKED';
key_bug_features: DEFAULT UNLOCKED state in programs table
